evals.prompt: Research: best practices for Kafka topic partitioning at >1M events/sec.
evals.expected_output: scripts/research.py dispatches to the best-fit provider; the result is saved as a research-source page in the active project's sources/ folder with research-source schema tagging.

evals.prompt: Find sources on Kinesis vs Kafka cost at our scale.
evals.expected_output: Same flow — provider chosen by question semantics; sources land in the active project.

evals.prompt: Research using Perplexity specifically — pricing on managed Kafka.
evals.expected_output: Honors the explicit provider preference; warns if the question semantics don't match the provider's strengths; saves source.
